classes.name: IBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: I-BERT integer-only quantized embeddings (QuantEmbedding + IntLayerNorm + QuantAct). kb-nano has no INT8 quantization kernels for embeddings; no direct map. Structurally similar to BERT-style sum of token+pos+type with LayerNorm.

classes.name: IBertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Integer-only quantized BERT-style self-attention (QuantLinear Q/K/V + IntSoftmax + QuantAct). kb-nano has no I-BERT-style INT8 attention kernels; would need bespoke. Closest fp baseline structurally is L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention but compute differs (QuantLinear/IntSoftmax).

classes.name: IBertSelfOutput
classes.rationale: QuantLinear + IntLayerNorm + QuantAct output projection; no kb-nano INT8 equivalent.

classes.name: IBertAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class around IBertSelfAttention + IBertSelfOutput; composes.

classes.name: IBertIntermediate
classes.rationale: QuantLinear + IntGELU; no kb-nano INT8 GELU/linear kernels.

classes.name: IBertOutput
classes.rationale: QuantLinear + IntLayerNorm; no kb-nano INT8 kernels.

classes.name: IBertLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring (attention + intermediate + output); composes.

classes.name: IBertEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring layer stack; composes.

classes.name: IBertPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh on [CLS] token; trivial wiring.

classes.name: IBertModel
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring; composes.

classes.name: IBertForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: IBertLMHead
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + LayerNorm + Linear MLM head; trivial wiring.

classes.name: IBertForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: IBertForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: IBertForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: IBertClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear+tanh+Linear classifier; trivial wiring.

classes.name: IBertForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: IdeficsDecoupledEmbedding
classes.rationale: Subclass of nn.Embedding with extra additional_embedding logic (concatenated lookup); compute is just embedding lookup which maps to L1/embedding.py.

classes.name: IdeficsDecoupledLinear
classes.rationale: Subclass of nn.Linear with extra additional_out features (concat output); compute = two linears concatenated; maps to L1/linear.py.

classes.name: IdeficsRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Docstring 'IdeficsRMSNorm is equivalent to T5LayerNorm'; fp32-promoted variance, weight-only, no centering, dtype cast back. Matches kb-nano L1/t5_layer_norm.py exactly. (L1/rms_norm.py uses vLLM CUDA kernel with bf16 fast-path; T5-style fp32 promotion is a different numerical path.)

classes.name: IdeficsEmbedding
classes.rationale: LlamaRotaryEmbedding-style cos/sin cache; standard NeoX-style RoPE. Matches L1/rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: IdeficsMLP
classes.rationale: Adapted from LlamaMLP: gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj with act(gate)*up SwiGLU pattern. Maps to L2/llama_mlp.py (which uses SiluAndMul fused kernel).

classes.name: IdeficsAttention
classes.rationale: Adapted from LlamaAttention; supports both self-attention (with RoPE) and cross-attention (no RoPE, K/V from key_value_states). Optional qk_layer_norms (RMSNorm). Self-attention path maps to L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention. Cross-attention path is a custom variant with no kb-nano direct map (no encoder-decoder pattern with paged KV in kb-nano like Whisper has).

classes.name: IdeficsDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: input_layernorm + self_attn + post_attention_layernorm + mlp; composes.

classes.name: IdeficsGatedCrossAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: cross_attn (IdeficsAttention) + tanh-gated residual + mlp; composes (gating uses tanh on a scalar gate parameter, no special kb-nano kernel).

classes.name: IdeficsModel
classes.rationale: Top-level vision-text model wiring; composes.

classes.name: IdeficsForVisionText2Text
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: Idefics2VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: SigLIP-style patch+pos embedding adapted for variable resolution (NaViT). Compute = Conv2d patch embed + Embedding(position_ids). Maps to L1/conv2d.py + L1/embedding.py; the bucketize/clamp NaViT logic is index math without a kernel.

classes.name: Idefics2VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Copied from SiglipAttention with separate Q/K/V Linear (bias=True default), non-causal, head_dim^-0.5 scale. Matches L2/siglip_attention.py:SigLIPAttention exactly.

classes.name: Idefics2VisionMLP
classes.rationale: Copied from SiglipMLP: fc1 -> ACT2FN[hidden_act] (GELU) -> fc2. Matches L2/siglip_mlp.py:SigLIPMLP.

classes.name: Idefics2MLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU pattern: gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj with act(gate)*up. Used by Perceiver and Connector. Maps to L2/llama_mlp.py (output_size param differs slightly but same SwiGLU compute).

classes.name: Idefics2MultiheadAttentionPoolingHead
classes.rationale: Uses torch.nn.MultiheadAttention with learnable probe + LayerNorm + Idefics2MLP. Pattern is similar to AttentionPoolLatent (L2/attention_pool.py) but uses cls-token attention with K/V=hidden_state and SwiGLU MLP rather than fc1/GELU/fc2; close-enough but with a SwiGLU MLP it diverges. No direct map; composes. (Per audit guidelines L2/attention_pool.py is for cls_token+K/V+SDPA pattern; this differs by using torch.nn.MultiheadAttention internally and SwiGLU MLP.)

classes.name: Idefics2EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: SigLIP-style layer wiring (LayerNorm + self_attn + LayerNorm + mlp); composes.

classes.name: Idefics2Encoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack wiring; composes.

classes.name: Idefics2VisionTransformer
classes.rationale: Top-level vision wiring; composes.

classes.name: Idefics2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: Docstring 'equivalent to T5LayerNorm'; fp32 variance + dtype cast back. Maps to L1/t5_layer_norm.py.

classes.name: Idefics2PerceiverAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention with GQA: latents=Q (bsz,n_latents,d), context concatenated for K/V (bsz,seq+n_latents,d), q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj separate, no RoPE, non-causal, head_dim^-0.5. Used in Perceiver Resampler. No direct kb-nano file (it's a non-causal GQA cross-attention without paged KV). Closest pattern is L2/encoder_attention.py but with separate KV head count; would decompose from L1/linear+L1/sdpa.

classes.name: Idefics2PerceiverLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: norms + perceiver_attn + Idefics2MLP; composes.

classes.name: Idefics2PerceiverResampler
classes.rationale: Layer stack wiring with learnable latents; composes.

classes.name: Idefics2Connector
classes.rationale: Pixel-shuffle reshape + Idefics2MLP + Idefics2PerceiverResampler; pure wiring.

classes.name: Idefics2Model
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring; composes.

classes.name: Idefics2ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: Idefics3VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Copied from Idefics2VisionEmbeddings; SigLIP NaViT-style. Conv2d patch embed + Embedding pos. Maps to L1/conv2d.py + L1/embedding.py.

classes.name: Idefics3VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Copied from SiglipAttention; identical to L2/siglip_attention.py.

classes.name: Idefics3VisionMLP
classes.rationale: Copied from SiglipMLP; fc1+GELU+fc2. Maps to L2/siglip_mlp.py.

classes.name: Idefics3SimpleMLP
classes.rationale: Single Linear projection (vision_hidden*scale^2 -> text_hidden); trivial linear, maps to L1/linear.py.

classes.name: Idefics3EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LayerNorm+self_attn+LayerNorm+mlp (SigLIP-style); composes.

classes.name: Idefics3Encoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack wiring; composes.

classes.name: Idefics3RMSNorm
classes.rationale: Docstring 'equivalent to T5LayerNorm'; fp32 variance, dtype cast back. Maps to L1/t5_layer_norm.py.

classes.name: Idefics3Connector
classes.rationale: Pixel-shuffle reshape + Idefics3SimpleMLP; pure wiring.

classes.name: Idefics3VisionTransformer
classes.rationale: Top-level vision wiring; composes.

classes.name: Idefics3Model
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring; composes.

classes.name: Idefics3ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: IJepaEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Inherits from ViTEmbeddings, deletes cls_token, replaces position_embeddings with no-cls Parameter; otherwise same Conv2d patch embedding + learnable absolute pos. Maps to L2/vision_patch_embed.py:VisionPatchEmbed (Conv2d-based patch embedding). Note: pos_embed is a separate Parameter not a module; if vision_patch_embed.py only handles the Conv2d step, the add-position step is inline. (Verified vision_patch_embed.py exists; Conv2d-based patch embedding is the kernel.)

classes.name: IJepaModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: embeddings + ViT encoder (inherited from ViTModel); composes.

classes.name: IJepaForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring (mean-pool features + linear classifier); composes.

ijepa._note: Modular file is sparse - all attention/mlp/layer compute is inherited from ViT; the modular delta is only the embedding (no cls_token) and the classifier head. Per ViT inheritance, the encoder uses ViTSelfAttention which maps to L2/vit_encoder_attention.py:ViTEncoderAttention (encoder-style fc1+GELU+fc2 MLP with LayerNorm). Modeling_ijepa.py expands this with classes IJepaSelfAttention/IJepaAttention/IJepaIntermediate/IJepaOutput/IJepaLayer/IJepaEncoder which copy ViT structure; they would map to L2/vit_encoder_attention.py and L2/vit_encoder_mlp.py respectively. We list only the modular file's delta; expanded modeling classes are wiring around the same ViT compute.

classes.name: ImageGPTLayerNorm
classes.rationale: No-mean-centering RMS-style norm (tensor / sqrt(mean(square)+eps) * weight); matches T5LayerNorm pattern (no centering, no bias). Maps to L1/t5_layer_norm.py. Note: doesn't explicitly fp32-promote but is otherwise structurally identical.

classes.name: ImageGPTAttention
classes.rationale: GPT2-style with Conv1D (transposed-linear) for c_attn (3*embed_dim fused QKV) and c_proj. Causal self-attention or cross-attention. Has scale_attn_weights, scale_attn_by_inverse_layer_idx, reorder_and_upcast_attn knobs. No direct kb-nano file: kb-nano L2/attention.py uses QKVParallelLinear (not Conv1D) and assumes Llama-family defaults; would need decomposition. Bare nn.Linear would match if Conv1D were just transposed-linear; the math is equivalent but checkpoint layout differs.

classes.name: ImageGPTMLP
classes.rationale: Conv1D fc + activation + Conv1D fc; standard 2-layer MLP equivalent to GPT2. Compute matches encoder_mlp.py / clip_mlp.py pattern (fc1+act+fc2) but with Conv1D instead of nn.Linear (mathematically identical, just transposed weight). No direct kb-nano file maps because no GPT2-style Conv1D kernel exists; closest is L2/clip_mlp.py for the activation+linear pattern.

classes.name: ImageGPTBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: ln_1 + attn + ln_2 + mlp + optional cross-attn; composes.

classes.name: ImageGPTModel
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: ImageGPTForCausalImageModeling
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: ImageGPTForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: InformerFeatureEmbedder
classes.rationale: Inherits TimeSeriesFeatureEmbedder which is a list of nn.Embedding for cardinality categories; lookup is L1/embedding.py.

classes.name: InformerStdScaler
classes.rationale: Standard scaling (subtract mean, divide std); arithmetic only, no kernel needed; composes.

classes.name: InformerMeanScaler
classes.rationale: Mean scaling; arithmetic only; composes.

classes.name: InformerNOPScaler
classes.rationale: No-op scaler; identity, composes.

classes.name: InformerSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Sinusoidal positional embedding (sin/cos table lookup); maps to L1/sinusoidal_embed.py.

classes.name: InformerValueEmbedding
classes.rationale: Linear projection of feature values; maps to L1/linear.py.

classes.name: InformerAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits BartAttention (encoder-decoder MHA with q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/out_proj, optional cross-attention K/V from key_value_states, manual scaling). No-pass-through (only `pass`). Per audit guidelines (Bart-family encoder-decoder), decompose to L1: L1/linear.py for projections + L1/sdpa.py or L1/dense_attention.py for scaled dot-product. No direct L2 file for Bart-style enc-dec attention exists in kb-nano.

classes.name: InformerProbSparseAttention
classes.rationale: Custom probabilistic-sparse attention: samples top-u keys by sparsity measure, computes attention only over reduced query set, fills rest from cumulative mean of values. This is Informer-paper-specific (O(L log L) attention); not a primitive in kb-nano. Decomposes to L1/linear.py + L1/bmm.py + L1/softmax.py + custom sampling/topk index ops; no direct kernel file.

classes.name: InformerConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1D + BatchNorm1d + ELU + MaxPool1d distillation block. Note: kb-nano has L1/batch_norm2d.py for 2D; BatchNorm1d would need L1 variant or share underlying impl (the math is the same; kernel may not exist for 1D). Closest mapping list.

classes.name: InformerEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: self_attn (Prob or regular) + LayerNorm + fc1+act+fc2 + LayerNorm; composes.

classes.name: InformerDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: self_attn + cross_attn + LayerNorm + fc1+act+fc2 + LayerNorm; composes.

classes.name: InformerEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack + value embedding + sinusoidal pos embedding + InformerConvLayer distillations; composes.

classes.name: InformerDecoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack wiring; composes.

classes.name: InformerModel
classes.rationale: Top-level encoder-decoder wiring; composes.

classes.name: InformerForPrediction
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with distribution head; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BLIP-style vision embedding (Conv2d patch embed + class_embedding + position_embedding parameter). Conv2d step maps to L1/conv2d.py; cls and pos are Parameter additions (no kernel).

classes.name: InstructBlipAttention
classes.rationale: BLIP-2 vision attention: fused qkv Linear (3*embed_dim) with optional q_bias/v_bias (no k_bias), separate projection. Non-causal, eager attention without fp32-softmax cast (note in source). Different from CLIP/SigLIP (fused qkv vs separate; also bias pattern differs). Closest kb-nano L2 is siglip_attention.py but layout differs (separate Q/K/V there); decomposes to L1/linear.py + L1/sdpa.py.

classes.name: InstructBlipMLP
classes.rationale: Copied from BlipMLP: fc1 -> ACT2FN[hidden_act] -> fc2; standard 2-layer MLP. Maps to L2/clip_mlp.py (CLIP uses QuickGELU, but BLIP can use any ACT2FN; if hidden_act is GELU, structurally equivalent to encoder_mlp/siglip_mlp). Closest match given the fc1+act+fc2 pattern.

classes.name: InstructBlipEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LayerNorm+self_attn+LayerNorm+mlp; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVisionModel
classes.rationale: Top-level vision model wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerMultiHeadAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style MHA: separate Q/K/V Linear with bias=True (default), optional cross-attention (K/V from encoder_hidden_states with encoder_hidden_size), softmax with mask, manual matmul. Self-attention path matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention pattern (separate Q/K/V, non-causal, with mask). Cross-attention path is similar but reads K/V from encoder_hidden_states at encoder_hidden_size dim - encoder_attention.py wires self-attention only; cross-attention path decomposes from L1.

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Copied from BertSelfOutput: dense + dropout + LayerNorm(x + input). Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput exactly (dense + LayerNorm with residual).

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring around InstructBlipQFormerMultiHeadAttention + InstructBlipQFormerSelfOutput; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerIntermediate
classes.rationale: Copied from BertIntermediate: dense + ACT2FN[hidden_act]. Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate (with GELU activation default).

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerOutput
classes.rationale: Copied from BertOutput: dense + dropout + LayerNorm(x + input). Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: attention + optional cross-attention (every cross_attention_frequency-th layer) + intermediate + output; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position embedding + LayerNorm. Maps to L2/encoder_embeddings.py:EncoderEmbeddingsBase pattern.

classes.name: InstructBlipQFormerModel
classes.rationale: Top-level QFormer wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipModel
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring (vision + qformer + language model); composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Same as InstructBlipVisionEmbeddings (BLIP-style); Conv2d patch embedding.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word+pos embeddings + LayerNorm; same as InstructBlipQFormerEmbeddings.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoAttention
classes.rationale: Same as InstructBlipAttention: BLIP-2 fused qkv + projection; non-causal vision attention with optional q/v biases. Decomposes from L1.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoMLP
classes.rationale: fc1+ACT2FN+fc2 (BLIP-style); maps to L2/clip_mlp.py.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoVisionModel
classes.rationale: Top-level vision model wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerMultiHeadAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style MHA with optional cross-attention; same as InstructBlipQFormerMultiHeadAttention. Self-attn path maps to L2/encoder_attention.py.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerIntermediate
classes.rationale: Maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerOutput
classes.rationale: Maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring with optional cross-attention; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoQFormerModel
classes.rationale: Top-level QFormer wiring; composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoModel
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring (per-frame vision + qformer + language); composes.

classes.name: InstructBlipVideoForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

instructblipvideo._note: Compute is identical to instructblip per modular file (only model-level wiring differs to handle video frames). Mapping mirrors instructblip.

classes.name: InternVLVisionRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaRMSNorm with `pass`; standard Llama-family RMSNorm. Maps to L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: InternVLVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits JanusVisionAttention; overrides __init__ to add optional q_norm/k_norm (RMSNorm if config.use_qk_norm). Custom forward applies q_norm/k_norm BEFORE reshape (full embed_dim, not per-head). Non-causal vision attention with separate Q/K/V Linear, projection_layer + projection_dropout. No direct kb-nano file: pattern is between SigLIP (separate Q/K/V no QK-norm) and Llama vision (with QK-norm). Decomposes from L1/linear + L1/rms_norm + L1/sdpa.

classes.name: InternVLVisionPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection; maps to L1/conv2d.py.

classes.name: InternVLVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring around InternVLVisionPatchEmbeddings + cls_token + optional pos embeddings + interpolation; composes.

classes.name: InternVLVisionMLP
classes.rationale: Inherits CLIPMLP with `pass`; fc1 + QuickGELU + fc2 (CLIP-style with QuickGELU activation). Maps to L2/clip_mlp.py exactly.

classes.name: InternVLVisionLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: layernorm_before + attention + lambda_1 scale + layernorm_after + mlp + lambda_2 scale (BEiT-style with layer_scale). Norm dispatched by config.norm_type to LayerNorm or InternVLVisionRMSNorm. Composes.

classes.name: InternVLVisionEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack; composes.

classes.name: InternVLVisionModel
classes.rationale: Top-level vision wiring; composes.

classes.name: InternVLMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear + ACT2FN + Linear; trivial wiring (composes).

classes.name: InternVLModel
classes.rationale: Inherits LlavaModel; overrides get_image_features (with pixel_shuffle downsampling) and forward. Wiring (composes).

classes.name: InternVLForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: JambaRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaRMSNorm with `pass`; standard Llama RMSNorm. Maps to L1/rms_norm.py. Note: JambaMambaMixer uses JambaRMSNorm on hidden_size=16 (mamba_d_state) and time_step_rank — kb-nano's L2/jamba_mamba_mixer.py uses L1/rms_norm_native.py for those small dims because the L1 rms_norm CUDA kernel doesn't handle non-multiple-of-32 sizes. The full hidden_size norm (rest of model) uses L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: JambaAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaAttention; overrides __init__ (separate q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj, no RoPE) and forward (no RoPE, GQA via num_key_value_heads). kb-nano L2/jamba_attention.py exactly mirrors this: fused QKVParallelLinear + Attention class (paged-KV) + RowParallelLinear o_proj, no RoPE. Verified by reading L2/jamba_attention.py.

classes.name: JambaMambaMixer
classes.rationale: Mamba v1 selective-scan mixer with per-layer dt/B/C RMSNorms (the Jamba special case). HF uses causal_conv1d_fn/_update + selective_scan_fn/selective_state_update. kb-nano L2/jamba_mamba_mixer.py uses identical vLLM ops (causal_conv1d_*/selective_*) plus L1/rms_norm_native.py for dt/B/C norms (small-dim safety). Verified.

classes.name: JambaMLP
classes.rationale: Inherits MistralMLP with `pass`; SwiGLU MLP (gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj). kb-nano L2/jamba_mlp.py mirrors this with MergedColumnParallelLinear + SiluAndMul + RowParallelLinear (fused SwiGLU).

classes.name: JambaExperts
classes.rationale: Inherits MixtralExperts with `pass`; fused-MoE expert grouped GEMM with SwiGLU. kb-nano L2/fused_experts.py:FusedExperts (used by JambaMoE) is the matching kernel.

classes.name: JambaSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: Sparse MoE: router Linear -> softmax+top-k (NO renormalisation) -> JambaExperts. kb-nano L2/jamba_moe.py:JambaMoE matches: TopKSoftmax(renormalize=False) + FusedExperts. Verified by reading L2/jamba_moe.py.

classes.name: JambaAttentionDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: input_layernorm + JambaAttention + pre_ff_layernorm + (JambaMLP or JambaSparseMoeBlock); composes.

classes.name: JambaMambaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: input_layernorm + JambaMambaMixer + pre_ff_layernorm + (MLP or MoE); composes.

classes.name: JambaModel
classes.rationale: Top-level model with mixed attention/mamba layers; composes (kb-nano L3/jamba_decoder.py and L4/jamba.py wire this).

classes.name: JambaForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: JambaForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: JanusVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: SigLIP-style vision embeddings (Conv2d patch + Embedding pos). Maps to L1/conv2d.py + L1/embedding.py.

classes.name: JanusVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Vision attention: separate Q/K/V Linear, optional q_norm/k_norm (LayerNorm on full embed_dim BEFORE per-head reshape), separate projection_layer + projection_dropout. Non-causal. Closest kb-nano is L2/siglip_attention.py but qk-norm differs (siglip has none) and bias is configurable. Decomposes from L1/linear + L1/layer_norm + L1/sdpa.

classes.name: JanusVisionMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN[hidden_act] + dropout + fc2 + dropout. Standard 2-layer MLP; maps to L2/clip_mlp.py-pattern (with GELU instead of QuickGELU per config). Closest match.

classes.name: JanusVisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Inherits SiglipEncoderLayer; overrides modules. Wiring; composes.

classes.name: JanusVisionEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack; composes.

classes.name: JanusVisionModel
classes.rationale: Top-level vision model wiring; composes.

classes.name: JanusVisionAlignerMLP
classes.rationale: Multi-layer projection: fc1 + (act + linear)^depth; trivial wiring.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: Discrete codebook lookup + L2 normalize + reshape; uses L1/embedding.py for codebook lookup, L2 norm via F.normalize. No direct kb-nano file.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEResnetBlock
classes.rationale: VQ-VAE residual conv block (Conv2d + GroupNorm + activation); composes from L1/conv2d.py + L1/group_norm.py.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEAttnBlock
classes.rationale: VAE-style spatial self-attention (channel-as-feature). Decomposes from L1/conv2d + L1/sdpa.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEConvDownsample
classes.rationale: Conv2d downsample; maps to L1/conv2d.py.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEConvUpsample
classes.rationale: F.interpolate (nearest 2x) + Conv2d. Maps to L1/interpolate.py + L1/conv2d.py.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEMidBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: resnet block + attn block + resnet block; composes.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEEncoder
classes.rationale: VAE encoder: stem conv + multi-scale resnet/attn/downsample blocks + mid block + GroupNorm + sigmoid-mul (Swish) + conv_out; composes.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEDecoder
classes.rationale: VAE decoder: mirror of encoder; composes.

classes.name: JanusVQVAE
classes.rationale: Top-level VQ-VAE wiring; composes.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEAlignerMLP
classes.rationale: Multi-layer projection MLP; trivial wiring.

classes.name: JanusVQVAEHead
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + Linear (vision head for image generation); trivial wiring.

classes.name: JanusModel
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring (vision + VQ-VAE + Llama text); composes.

classes.name: JanusForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with image-and-text generation; composes.

classes.name: JetMoeRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits MixtralRMSNorm with `pass` (which is LlamaRMSNorm equivalent). Maps to L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: JetMoeRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Inherits MixtralRotaryEmbedding (Llama-family RoPE) with `pass`. Maps to L1/rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: JetMoeParallelExperts
classes.rationale: Per-expert F.linear loop over input split by expert_size. Naive non-fused MoE expert compute. Pattern matches structurally with kb-nano L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py (fused grouped GEMM) but the HF version does serial per-expert linears. The kb-nano fused version is what an optimized implementation would use; closest mapping is L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py.

classes.name: JetMoeTopKGating
classes.rationale: Linear router + topk + softmax + scatter for expert sorting. Linear is L1/linear.py; the topk+softmax pattern is in L1/topk_softmax.py (though HF reorders: topk-then-softmax vs softmax-then-topk in some configs; here it's topk then softmax over top-k logits).

classes.name: JetMoeMoE
classes.rationale: MoE FFN with SwiGLU (input_linear -> chunk + activation*gate -> output_linear) per expert. Bias added at end. No direct kb-nano file matching this exact (per-expert serial) pattern; would need fused-MoE kernel adaptation. Closest is L2/fused_experts.py + L1/silu_and_mul.py if optimized.

classes.name: JetMoeMoA
classes.rationale: Mixture-of-Attention: routes tokens to attention experts (each with its own input_linear/output_linear projections); novel routing for q-projection. No kb-nano file (unique to JetMoe). map() and reduce() methods compute per-expert q/o projections separately.

classes.name: JetMoeAttention
classes.rationale: Uses JetMoeMoA for q-projection (mixture of attention heads), kv_proj is single Linear. RoPE applied. K/V repeated top_k times for the mixed-attention pattern. Custom; no direct kb-nano file. Decomposes from L1/linear + L1/rotary_emb + L1/sdpa + custom MoA routing.

classes.name: JetMoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: input_layernorm + JetMoeAttention + post_attention_layernorm + JetMoeMoE; composes.

classes.name: JetMoeModel
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring; composes.

classes.name: JetMoeForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: JetMoeForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

kimi_linear._note: SKIPPED: folder kimi_linear does not exist in pinned transformers commit da6c53e4 (verified `ls /tmp/hf_transformers_pinned/src/transformers/models/ | grep kimi` returns no matches). kb-nano has L4/kimi_linear.py which references this architecture, but the HF source is not yet upstreamed in the pinned commit.

kimi_vl._note: SKIPPED: folder kimi_vl does not exist in pinned transformers commit da6c53e4.

kimi_vlm._note: SKIPPED: folder kimi_vlm does not exist in pinned transformers commit da6c53e4.

classes.name: Kosmos2VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: CLIP-style vision embedding: Conv2d patch embed + class_embedding + position_embedding (Embedding). Conv2d step is L1/conv2d.py.

classes.name: Kosmos2VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Standard CLIP/SigLIP-style vision attention: separate Q/K/V Linear (bias=True default), separate out_proj. Non-causal. Same pattern as L2/siglip_attention.py.

classes.name: Kosmos2VisionMLP
classes.rationale: Copied from CLIPMLP: fc1 + ACT2FN[hidden_act] + fc2. Maps to L2/clip_mlp.py (CLIP variant).

classes.name: Kosmos2VisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring (LayerNorm + self_attn + LayerNorm + mlp); composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2VisionEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2VisionTransformer
classes.rationale: Top-level vision wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2TextSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Sinusoidal position embedding from M2M100; maps to L1/sinusoidal_embed.py (sin/cos table).

classes.name: KosmosTextAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-derived attention with optional inner_attn_ln (extra LayerNorm after attention output before out_proj). Supports self-attention (causal) and cross-attention (encoder K/V). Per audit guideline, Bart-family encoder-decoder attention decomposes to L1: L1/linear.py + L1/layer_norm.py + L1/sdpa.py. No direct L2 file.

classes.name: Kosmos2TextFFN
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN + dropout + LayerNorm + fc2 + dropout. Has an extra ffn_layernorm after activation (uncommon). Closest L2 is whisper_mlp.py / encoder_mlp.py but with extra LayerNorm; decomposes from L1.

classes.name: Kosmos2TextBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: norm + self_attn + norm + cross_attn (optional) + norm + ffn; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2TextTransformer
classes.rationale: Top-level text decoder wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2VisionModel
classes.rationale: Top-level vision wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2TextModel
classes.rationale: Top-level text wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2TextForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2ImageToTextProjection
classes.rationale: Vision feature projection (Linear) + latent query attention; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2Model
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5LayerNorm
classes.rationale: Docstring 'T5-style layernorm, no bias and no subtraction of mean'; fp32 variance, dtype cast back. Identical to L1/t5_layer_norm.py.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Pix2Struct-style vision embedding: Linear patch projection + row + col Embedding. No Conv2d (operates on pre-flattened patches with row/col indices). Maps to L1/linear.py + L1/embedding.py.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5VisionMlp
classes.rationale: Copied from T5DenseGatedActDense (Pix2Struct vision MLP): wi_0/wi_1/wo with act(wi_0(x))*wi_1(x). SwiGLU/GeGLU pattern (depending on dense_act_fn). Maps to L2/llama_mlp.py if dense_act_fn=silu, or to L2/geglu.py-style if dense_act_fn=gelu. Closest match L2/llama_mlp.py for the gated structure.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Pix2Struct-style attention: separate query/key/value/output Linear (bias=False, all without bias), non-causal. Different from CLIP/SigLIP (those have bias=True). Decomposes from L1/linear + L1/sdpa; no exact L2 match (encoder_attention has bias, siglip has bias). Closest is decompose.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5VisionLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre_attention_norm + attention + pre_mlp_norm + mlp; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5VisionEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5TextSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Sinusoidal pos embedding (M2M100-derived); maps to L1/sinusoidal_embed.py.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5TextFFN
classes.rationale: fc1 + activation + dropout + LayerNorm + fc2 (intra-FFN LayerNorm is unusual). Decomposes from L1.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5TextAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-derived text attention (similar to KosmosTextAttention with inner_attn_ln). Decomposes to L1 per Bart-family rule.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5TextBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5TextTransformer
classes.rationale: Top-level text wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5ImageToTextProjection
classes.rationale: Image-to-text projection wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5VisionModel
classes.rationale: Top-level vision wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5TextModel
classes.rationale: Top-level text wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5Model
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5TextForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: Kosmos2_5ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: KyutaiSpeechToTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Single nn.Embedding lookup with audio-token offsets (text + per-codebook audio tokens); compute = embedding lookup + sum across codebook dim. Maps to L1/embedding.py for the lookup.

classes.name: KyutaiSpeechToTextModel
classes.rationale: Inherits MoshiModel; only overrides embed_tokens. Wiring; composes (MoshiModel itself uses Llama-family decoder layers).

classes.name: KyutaiSpeechToTextForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head + codec model + custom generation. Composes.

kyutai_speech_to_text._note: All transformer compute (attention/MLP/norms) is inherited unchanged from MoshiModel/LlamaForCausalLM; the modular file's delta is the embedding handling and the codec-driven generation logic. Per-arch attention/MLP/RMSNorm map via the parent (Llama/Moshi).

classes.name: LayoutLMEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token_type + 4 spatial bbox embeddings (x_position_embeddings, y_position_embeddings, h/w_position_embeddings) + LayerNorm. The base sum-of-embeddings + LayerNorm matches L2/encoder_embeddings.py:EncoderEmbeddingsBase; the spatial bbox parts are extra Embedding lookups (still L1/embedding.py).

classes.name: LayoutLMSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style separate Q/K/V Linear (bias=True), non-causal, head_dim^-0.5 scale, eager attention with mask. Identical to L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention pattern.

classes.name: LayoutLMSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Copied from BertSelfOutput: dense + dropout + LayerNorm(x + input). Maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LayoutLMAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring: self + output (BERT-style); composes (per audit rule 11, bare *Attention is wiring around *SelfAttention).

classes.name: LayoutLMIntermediate
classes.rationale: Copied from BertIntermediate: dense + ACT2FN[hidden_act] (GELU). Maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: LayoutLMOutput
classes.rationale: Copied from BertOutput; maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LayoutLMLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: attention + intermediate + output; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh on [CLS] token; trivial wiring.

classes.name: LayoutLMPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + LayerNorm; trivial wiring.

classes.name: LayoutLMLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Wiring (transform + decoder linear); composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMOnlyMLMHead
classes.rationale: Wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMModel
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2Embeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token_type + 4 spatial bbox embeddings + LayerNorm. Same as LayoutLM. Maps to L2/encoder_embeddings.py pattern.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2SelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style attention but with optional fast_qkv (single fused linear Q/K/V with separate q_bias/v_bias parameters, no k_bias) AND with relative_attention_bias and spatial_attention_bias added to attention_scores. Custom math: query/sqrt(d), then matmul, then add rel_pos and rel_2d_pos. Custom masking with masked_fill_. No direct kb-nano file: encoder_attention.py uses separate Q/K/V (not fused with split bias) and doesn't support extra positional biases. Decomposes from L1.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2Attention
classes.rationale: Wiring around self + output; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2SelfOutput
classes.rationale: BertSelfOutput: dense + dropout + LayerNorm(x+input); maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2Intermediate
classes.rationale: Copied from BertIntermediate; maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2Output
classes.rationale: Copied from BertOutput; maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2Layer
classes.rationale: Wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2Encoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack + relative_position_bucket + 1D and 2D position bias projection (Linear); composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2VisualBackbone
classes.rationale: Detectron2 ResNet-FPN backbone; uses external detectron2 lib (FPN+ResNet). No kb-nano backbone file matches. Composes from external.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2Pooler
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh on [CLS]; trivial wiring.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2Model
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring (text + visual + encoder); composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2ForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2ForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv2ForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3PatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embedding for visual tokens; maps to L1/conv2d.py.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3TextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style word + position + token_type + 4 spatial bbox embeddings + LayerNorm; maps to L2/encoder_embeddings.py pattern.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3SelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT/RoBERTa-style attention with cogview_attention (custom softmax stabilization for fp16 overflow): scaled_attn / alpha then minus max then * alpha then softmax. Plus optional rel_pos/rel_2d_pos biases. Different softmax path from standard nn.functional.softmax. No direct kb-nano file. Decomposes from L1.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3SelfOutput
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style; maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3Attention
classes.rationale: Wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3Layer
classes.rationale: Wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3Encoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack + 1D and 2D rel-pos bias projections; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3Intermediate
classes.rationale: BertIntermediate-derived; maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3Output
classes.rationale: BertOutput-derived; maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3Model
classes.rationale: Top-level model wiring (text + patch + encoder); composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3ClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh + Linear classifier; trivial wiring.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3ForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3ForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LayoutLMv3ForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LasrEncoderSubsampling
classes.rationale: Linear -> ReLU -> Conv1d -> ReLU -> Conv1d -> ReLU -> Linear (mel-spectrogram subsampling). Maps to L1/linear.py + L1/conv1d.py + L1/relu.py.

classes.name: LasrEncoderRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaRotaryEmbedding with `pass` (`...`); standard NeoX-style RoPE. Maps to L1/rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: LasrEncoderAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaAttention; overrides forward to set is_causal=False (encoder, not decoder). Otherwise standard q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj + RoPE + eager_attention_forward. Maps to L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention (which can be parameterised for non-causal). Note: it's an encoder attention; kb-nano L2/attention.py is targeted at causal decoder use. Closer match might be L2/encoder_attention.py for the non-causal aspect, but that file is BERT-style (no RoPE). Best match given RoPE+non-causal is decompose-from-L1, but L2/attention.py is the structural template for q/k/v/RoPE/attn-impl/o.

classes.name: LasrEncoderConvolutionModule
classes.rationale: Inherits ParakeetEncoderConvolutionModule; overrides padding to 'same' and norm to BatchNorm1d (with config momentum). Conformer convolution module pattern: pointwise conv + GLU + depthwise conv + norm + activation + pointwise conv. Composes from L1/conv1d + L1/batch_norm (note kb-nano has batch_norm2d.py but not batch_norm1d explicitly).

classes.name: LasrEncoderBlock
classes.rationale: Conformer encoder block: feed_forward1 (norm + FF) + self_attn (norm + LasrEncoderAttention) + conv (norm + LasrEncoderConvolutionModule) + feed_forward2 (norm + FF) + norm_out. Per-residual scaling with feed_forward_residual_weights and conv_residual_weights. Wiring; composes.

classes.name: LasrEncoder
classes.rationale: Top-level encoder wiring (subsampler + rotary + layer stack + out_norm); composes.

classes.name: LasrForCTC
classes.rationale: CTC head wiring (encoder + Linear vocab projection); composes.

classes.name: LEDLearnedPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Subclass of nn.Embedding for learned absolute positions; lookup is L1/embedding.py.

classes.name: LEDEncoderSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Longformer-style sliding-window + global attention (extremely complex custom op: chunked local attention + global tokens that attend to all + are attended to by all; uses unfold and matmul tricks). No kb-nano file matches Longformer attention; would need bespoke kernel. Decomposes from L1/linear + L1/sdpa with custom masking, but the sliding-window logic is custom code not a single kernel.

classes.name: LEDEncoderAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring around LEDEncoderSelfAttention + Linear output; composes.

classes.name: LEDDecoderAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-derived decoder attention with separate q/k/v/out_proj, optional cross-attention, manual scaling and bmm-based attention. Per audit guideline (Bart-family encoder-decoder), decomposes to L1/linear + L1/bmm + L1/softmax.

classes.name: LEDEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: self_attn + LayerNorm + fc1+act+fc2 + LayerNorm; composes.

classes.name: LEDDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: self_attn + cross_attn + LayerNorm + fc1+act+fc2 + LayerNorm; composes.

classes.name: LEDClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh + dropout + Linear; trivial wiring.

classes.name: LEDEncoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack + LearnedPositionalEmbedding + global attention bookkeeping; composes.

classes.name: LEDDecoder
classes.rationale: Layer stack + position embedding + cross-attention; composes.

classes.name: LEDModel
classes.rationale: Top-level encoder-decoder wiring; composes.

classes.name: LEDForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: LEDForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Task head wiring; composes.

classes.name: LevitConvEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d. Maps to L1/conv2d.py + L1/batch_norm2d.py.

classes.name: LevitPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: 4 stacked LevitConvEmbeddings + Hardswish; composes.

classes.name: MLPLayerWithBN
classes.rationale: Linear + BatchNorm1d (applied to flattened batch dim). Maps to L1/linear.py + L1/batch_norm2d.py (kb-nano has batch_norm2d which is the closest variant; pure 1D batch norm not implemented separately).

classes.name: LevitSubsample
classes.rationale: Strided slice of token sequence (no kernel); composes.

classes.name: LevitAttention
classes.rationale: Custom LeViT attention: MLPLayerWithBN for QKV projection, separate split for Q/K (key_dim) and V (attention_ratio*key_dim), LEARNABLE per-position attention biases (not RoPE; pos-distance-bucketed bias added to attention scores). Hardswish activation between projections. No direct kb-nano file matches this LeViT-specific design. Decomposes from L1/linear + L1/batch_norm + L1/sdpa + L1/hardswish + custom positional bias indexing.

classes.name: LevitAttentionSubsample
classes.rationale: Like LevitAttention but with subsampled queries (stride>1) and separate q/kv projections. Custom; decomposes from L1.

classes.name: LevitMLPLayer
classes.rationale: MLPLayerWithBN + Hardswish + MLPLayerWithBN; 2x expansion. Composes.

classes.name: LevitResidualLayer
classes.rationale: Residual wrapper (drop-path + add); pure wiring.

classes.name: LevitStage
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of LevitAttention/LevitMLPLayer + optional LevitAttentionSubsample; composes.

classes.name: LevitEncoder
classes.rationale: Multi-stage wiring; composes.

classes.name: LevitClassificationLayer
classes.rationale: BatchNorm + Linear classifier; maps to L1/batch_norm2d.py + L1/linear.py.

classes.name: LevitModel
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: LevitForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Top-level with classification head; composes.

classes.name: LevitForImageClassificationWithTeacher
classes.rationale: Distillation-aware classifier wiring; composes.

classes.name: Lfm2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaRMSNorm with `pass`; standard. Maps to L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: Lfm2RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Inherits Gemma2RotaryEmbedding with `pass`; Gemma2 uses standard rotary similar to Llama (NeoX). Maps to L1/rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: Lfm2MLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP: w2(silu(w1(x)) * w3(x)) where w1=gate, w3=up, w2=down. Has block_auto_adjust_ff_dim logic for custom intermediate sizing. Maps to L2/llama_mlp.py:LlamaMLP.

classes.name: Lfm2Attention
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaAttention; overrides __init__ to use 'out_proj' (not 'o_proj'), add q_layernorm/k_layernorm RMSNorm on per-head dim BEFORE RoPE. Forward: Q/K layernormed before RoPE then standard attention. Matches L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention with qk_norm=True (but kb-nano L2/attention.py applies qk_norm before RoPE on per-head dim — verified by reading file).

classes.name: Lfm2ShortConv
classes.rationale: Short-conv: in_proj (3x) -> chunk into B,C,x -> Bx = B*x -> causal_conv1d (or update for decode) -> y = C*conv_out -> out_proj. Maps to L1/causal_conv1d.py + L1/linear.py. Note: pure depthwise conv (groups=hidden_size). Has apply_mask_to_padding_states preprocessing.

classes.name: Lfm2DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: operator_norm + (Lfm2Attention OR Lfm2ShortConv per layer_types[i]) + ffn_norm + Lfm2MLP. Composes.

classes.name: Lfm2Model
classes.rationale: Top-level with mixed attention/short-conv layers; composes.

classes.name: Lfm2ForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaRMSNorm; standard. Maps to L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Inherits Lfm2RotaryEmbedding (Gemma2 RoPE); maps to L1/rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeMLP
classes.rationale: Same SwiGLU pattern (w1/w3/w2 = gate/up/down) but with explicit hidden_size/intermediate_size override. Maps to L2/llama_mlp.py.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeExperts
classes.rationale: Inherits Qwen2MoeExperts and overrides act_fn=F.silu. Qwen2MoeExperts is fused-MoE expert-grouped-GEMM with SwiGLU; maps to L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py (kb-nano's fused MoE primitive).

classes.name: Lfm2MoeSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: Sigmoid-based router (NOT softmax!) + topk + optional expert_bias for routing + optional norm-topk-prob + routed_scaling_factor + Lfm2MoeExperts. Custom routing math (sigmoid+topk, not softmax+topk like most MoEs). Closest kb-nano L2 is mixtral_moe.py / shared_expert_moe.py / qwen3_moe.py but routing differs (sigmoid vs softmax); decomposes from L1/linear + L1/sigmoid_topk.py (kb-nano has L1/sigmoid_topk.py for sigmoid+topk MoE routing) + L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits Lfm2Attention with `pass`; same as Lfm2Attention. Maps to L2/attention.py with qk_norm.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeShortConv
classes.rationale: Inherits Lfm2ShortConv with `pass`; same compute. Maps to L1/causal_conv1d.py + L1/linear.py.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Inherits Lfm2DecoderLayer; overrides feed_forward to MLP for first num_dense_layers, MoE block after. Composes.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeModel
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

classes.name: Lfm2MoeForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring with LM head; composes.

classes.name: Lfm2VlMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Linear-based vision-language projector; maps to L1/linear.py (with potentially LayerNorm and pixel-shuffle reshape; reading needed). Confirmed it's a simple projection per Llava-style pattern.

classes.name: Lfm2VlModel
classes.rationale: Inherits LlavaModel; wiring (vision tower + projector + Lfm2 language model); composes.

classes.name: Lfm2VlForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes.

lfm2_vl._note: Modular file is sparse - Lfm2-Vl is a Llava-style VLM that combines a SigLIP-style vision encoder (defined in vision config), a multi-modal projector, and Lfm2 language model. All transformer compute (attention/MLP/norms) is inherited via Llava/Lfm2. The modular delta is the projector and configuration.
